name: search_gmail_messages
description: Searches messages in a user's Gmail account based on a query. Returns both Message IDs and Thread IDs for each found message, along with Gmail web interface links for manual verification. Supports pagination via page_token parameter.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

query.description: The search query. Supports standard Gmail search operators.

page_size.description: The maximum number of messages to return. Defaults to 10.

page_token.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results. Use the next_page_token from a previous response.

name: get_gmail_message_content
description: Retrieves the full content (subject, sender, recipients, plain text body) of a specific Gmail message.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

message_id.description: The unique ID of the Gmail message to retrieve.

name: get_gmail_messages_content_batch
description: Retrieves the content of multiple Gmail messages in a single batch request. Supports up to 25 messages per batch to prevent SSL connection exhaustion.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

message_ids.description: List of Gmail message IDs to retrieve (max 25 per batch).

format.description: Message format. 'full' includes body, 'metadata' only headers. Defaults to 'full'.

name: get_gmail_attachment_content
description: Downloads an email attachment and saves it to local disk. In stdio mode, returns the local file path. In HTTP mode, returns a temporary download URL (valid for 1 hour).

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

message_id.description: The ID of the Gmail message containing the attachment.

attachment_id.description: The ID of the attachment to download.

name: send_gmail_message
description: Sends an email using the user's Gmail account. Supports both new emails and replies with optional attachments.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

body.description: Email body content (plain text or HTML).

body_format.description: Email body format. Use 'plain' for plaintext or 'html' for HTML content. Defaults to 'plain'.

from_name.description: Optional sender display name (e.g., 'Peter Hartree'). If provided, the From header will be formatted as 'Name <email>'.

from_email.description: Optional 'Send As' alias email address. Must be configured in Gmail settings.

thread_id.description: Optional Gmail thread ID to reply within.

in_reply_to.description: Optional RFC Message-ID of the message being replied to.

references.description: Optional chain of Message-IDs for proper threading.

name: draft_gmail_message
description: Creates a draft email in the user's Gmail account. Supports both new drafts and reply drafts with optional attachments.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

thread_id.description: Optional Gmail thread ID to reply within.

name: get_gmail_thread_content
description: Retrieves the complete content of a Gmail conversation thread, including all messages.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

thread_id.description: The Gmail thread ID to retrieve.

name: get_gmail_threads_content_batch
description: Retrieves the content of multiple Gmail threads in a single batch request.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

thread_ids.description: List of Gmail thread IDs to retrieve.

name: list_gmail_labels
description: Lists all labels in the user's Gmail account.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: manage_gmail_label
description: Manages Gmail labels: create, update, or delete labels.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

action.description: Action to perform on the label.

label_list_visibility.description: Whether the label is shown in the label list. Defaults to 'labelShow'.

message_list_visibility.description: Whether the label is shown in the message list. Defaults to 'show'.

name: list_gmail_filters
description: Lists all Gmail filters configured in the user's mailbox.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: manage_gmail_filter
description: Manages Gmail filters. Supports creating and deleting filters.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

criteria.description: Filter criteria (from, to, subject, query, etc.).

filter_action.description: Action to apply when filter matches (add/remove labels, mark read, etc.).

name: modify_gmail_message_labels
description: Adds or removes labels from a Gmail message.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

add_label_ids.description: List of label IDs to add to the message.

remove_label_ids.description: List of label IDs to remove from the message.

name: batch_modify_gmail_message_labels
description: Adds or removes labels from multiple Gmail messages in a single batch request.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

add_label_ids.description: List of label IDs to add.

remove_label_ids.description: List of label IDs to remove.

name: list_calendars
description: Retrieves a list of calendars accessible to the authenticated user.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: get_events
description: Retrieves events from a specified Google Calendar. Can retrieve a single event by ID or multiple events within a time range. Supports keyword search via the query parameter.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

calendar_id.description: The ID of the calendar to query. Use 'primary' for the user's primary calendar. Defaults to 'primary'.

event_id.description: The ID of a specific event to retrieve. If provided, retrieves only this event.

time_min.description: The start of the time range (inclusive) in RFC3339 format (e.g., '2024-05-12T10:00:00Z').

time_max.description: The end of the time range (exclusive) in RFC3339 format.

max_results.description: The maximum number of events to return. Defaults to 25.

query.description: A keyword to search for within event fields (summary, description, location).

detailed.description: Whether to return detailed event information including description, location, attendees. Defaults to false.

include_attachments.description: Whether to include attachment information in detailed event output. Only applies when detailed=true. Defaults to false.

name: manage_event
description: Manages calendar events. Supports creating, updating, and deleting events.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

start_time.description: Start time in RFC3339 format (required for create).

end_time.description: End time in RFC3339 format (required for create).

event_id.description: Event ID (required for update and delete).

attachments.description: List of Google Drive file URLs or IDs to attach.

add_google_meet.description: Whether to add or remove Google Meet.

guests_can_modify.description: Whether attendees can modify the event.

guests_can_see_other_guests.description: Whether attendees can see other guests.

name: query_freebusy
description: Returns free/busy information for a set of calendars.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

time_min.description: The start of the interval in RFC3339 format (e.g., '2024-05-12T10:00:00Z').

time_max.description: The end of the interval in RFC3339 format.

calendar_ids.description: List of calendar identifiers to query. If not provided, queries the primary calendar.

group_expansion_max.description: Maximum number of calendar identifiers to be provided for a single group. Max 100.

calendar_expansion_max.description: Maximum number of calendars for which FreeBusy information is to be provided. Max 50.

name: search_docs
description: Searches for Google Docs by name using Drive API (mimeType filter).

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

query.description: Search query string to match document names.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

name: get_doc_content
description: Retrieves content of a Google Doc or a Drive file (like .docx) identified by document_id.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

document_id.description: The Google Doc or Drive file ID.

name: list_docs_in_folder
description: Lists Google Docs within a specific Drive folder.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

folder_id.description: The Drive folder ID. Defaults to 'root'.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 100.

name: create_doc
description: Creates a new Google Doc and optionally inserts initial content.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

title.description: The title of the new document.

content.description: Optional initial content to insert into the document.

name: modify_doc_text
description: Modifies text in a Google Doc - can insert/replace text and/or apply formatting in a single operation.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

start_index.description: The start index in the document for the modification.

end_index.description: The end index in the document for the modification.

name: find_and_replace_doc
description: Finds and replaces text throughout a Google Doc.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

replace_text.description: The text to replace it with.

match_case.description: Whether to match case. Defaults to false.

tab_id.description: Optional tab ID to restrict find/replace to a specific tab.

name: insert_doc_elements
description: Inserts structural elements like tables, lists, or page breaks into a Google Doc.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

index.description: Position in the document where the element is inserted.

text.description: Initial text content for the inserted element.

name: insert_doc_image
description: Inserts an image into a Google Doc from Drive or a URL.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

image_source.description: A Google Drive file ID or a public image URL.

index.description: Position in the document where the image is inserted.

width.description: Image width in EMUs (English Metric Units). 0 to use original size.

height.description: Image height in EMUs. 0 to use original size.

name: update_doc_headers_footers
description: Updates headers or footers in a Google Doc.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

content.description: The text content to set in the header or footer.

name: batch_update_doc
description: Executes multiple document operations in a single atomic batch update.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

operations.description: List of Google Docs API request objects to apply as a batch update.

name: inspect_doc_structure
description: Essential tool for finding safe insertion points and understanding document structure.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

detailed.description: Whether to return detailed structural information. Defaults to false.

tab_id.description: Optional tab ID to inspect a specific tab.

name: get_doc_as_markdown
description: Reads a Google Doc and returns it as clean Markdown with optional comment context.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

include_comments.description: Whether to include document comments. Defaults to true.

comment_mode.description: How to display comments: 'inline' or 'appended'. Defaults to 'inline'.

include_resolved.description: Whether to include resolved comments. Defaults to false.

name: export_doc_to_pdf
description: Exports a Google Doc to PDF format and saves it to Google Drive.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

pdf_filename.description: Optional filename for the exported PDF.

folder_id.description: Optional Drive folder ID where the PDF will be saved.

name: insert_doc_tab
description: Inserts a new tab into a Google Doc.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

title.description: The title of the new tab.

index.description: Position at which to insert the tab.

parent_tab_id.description: Optional parent tab ID for nesting.

name: delete_doc_tab
description: Deletes a tab from a Google Doc by its tab ID.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

tab_id.description: The ID of the tab to delete.

name: update_doc_tab
description: Renames a tab in a Google Doc.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

tab_id.description: The ID of the tab to rename.

title.description: The new title for the tab.

name: list_spreadsheets
description: Lists spreadsheets from Google Drive that the user has access to.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

max_results.description: Maximum number of spreadsheets to return. Defaults to 25.

name: get_spreadsheet_info
description: Gets information about a specific spreadsheet including its sheets.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: read_sheet_values
description: Reads values from a specific range in a Google Sheet.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

range_name.description: A1 notation range to read (e.g., 'Sheet1!A1:D10'). Defaults to 'A1:Z1000'.

include_hyperlinks.description: Whether to include hyperlink data. Defaults to false.

include_notes.description: Whether to include cell notes. Defaults to false.

name: modify_sheet_values
description: Modifies values in a specific range of a Google Sheet - can write, update, or clear values.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

value_input_option.description: How the input data should be interpreted: 'USER_ENTERED' or 'RAW'. Defaults to 'USER_ENTERED'.

clear_values.description: If true, clears the values in the range instead of writing. Defaults to false.

name: format_sheet_range
description: Applies formatting to a range in a Google Sheet: colors, number formats, text wrapping, borders, alignment, and more.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: manage_conditional_formatting
description: Manages conditional formatting rules on a Google Sheet. Supports adding, updating, and deleting rules.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

range_name.description: A1 notation range to apply the conditional formatting rule.

condition_values.description: Values to compare against in the condition.

name: create_spreadsheet
description: Creates a new Google Spreadsheet.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

title.description: The title of the new spreadsheet.

sheet_names.description: Optional list of sheet names to create within the spreadsheet.

name: create_sheet
description: Creates a new sheet within an existing spreadsheet.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

sheet_name.description: The name of the new sheet.

name: search_drive_files
description: Searches for files and folders within a user's Google Drive, including shared drives.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

query.description: Search query string using Drive API query syntax.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

drive_id.description: Optional shared drive ID to search within.

include_items_from_all_drives.description: Whether to include items from shared drives. Defaults to true.

corpora.description: The source of files to search (e.g., 'user', 'drive', 'allDrives').

name: get_drive_file_content
description: Retrieves the content of a specific Google Drive file by ID, supporting files in shared drives.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: get_drive_file_download_url
description: Downloads a Google Drive file and saves it to local disk.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

export_format.description: Optional export format for Google Workspace files (e.g., 'pdf', 'docx', 'csv').

name: list_drive_items
description: Lists files and folders in Google Drive, supporting shared drives.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

folder_id.description: The Drive folder ID to list. Defaults to 'root'.

page_size.description: Maximum number of items to return. Defaults to 100.

include_items_from_all_drives.description: Whether to include items from shared drives. Defaults to true.

name: create_drive_folder
description: Creates a new folder in Google Drive, supporting creation within shared drives.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

folder_name.description: The name of the new folder.

parent_folder_id.description: The parent folder ID. Defaults to 'root'.

name: create_drive_file
description: Creates a new file in Google Drive, supporting creation within shared drives.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

file_name.description: The name of the new file.

content.description: Optional text content of the file.

folder_id.description: The parent folder ID. Defaults to 'root'.

mime_type.description: MIME type for the file. Defaults to 'text/plain'.

fileUrl.description: Optional URL to fetch content from.

name: import_to_google_doc
description: Imports a file (Markdown, DOCX, TXT, HTML, RTF, ODT) into Google Docs format with automatic conversion.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

file_name.description: The name for the imported Google Doc.

file_path.description: Optional local file path to import.

file_url.description: Optional URL to fetch content from.

folder_id.description: The parent folder ID. Defaults to 'root'.

name: get_drive_file_permissions
description: Gets detailed metadata about a Google Drive file including sharing permissions.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: update_drive_file
description: Updates metadata and properties of a Google Drive file.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

add_parents.description: Comma-separated list of parent folder IDs to add.

remove_parents.description: Comma-separated list of parent folder IDs to remove.

name: manage_drive_access
description: Consolidated tool for managing Google Drive file and folder access permissions.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

file_id.description: The Google Drive file or folder ID.

share_with.description: Email address to share with (for 'share' action).

name: copy_drive_file
description: Creates a copy of an existing Google Drive file.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

file_id.description: The Google Drive file ID to copy.

parent_folder_id.description: Parent folder ID for the copy. Defaults to 'root'.

name: search_custom
description: Performs a search using Google Custom Search JSON API.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

num.description: Number of results to return. Defaults to 10.

start.description: The index of the first result to return. Defaults to 1.

search_type.description: Optional search type. Set to 'image' for image search.

site_search.description: Optional domain to restrict search to.

name: get_search_engine_info
description: Retrieves metadata about a Programmable Search Engine.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: list_task_lists
description: List all task lists for the user.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

max_results.description: Maximum number of task lists to return. Defaults to 1000.

name: get_task_list
description: Get details of a specific task list.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: manage_task_list
description: Manage task lists: create, update, delete, or clear completed tasks.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: list_tasks
description: List all tasks in a specific task list.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

max_results.description: Maximum number of tasks to return.

show_completed.description: Whether to include completed tasks. Defaults to true.

show_deleted.description: Whether to include deleted tasks. Defaults to false.

name: get_task
description: Get details of a specific task.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: manage_task
description: Manage tasks: create, update, delete, or move tasks within task lists.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: create_presentation
description: Create a new Google Slides presentation.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

title.description: The presentation title. Defaults to 'Untitled Presentation'.

name: get_presentation
description: Get details about a Google Slides presentation.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: batch_update_presentation
description: Apply batch updates to a Google Slides presentation.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

requests.description: List of Slides API request objects to apply.

name: get_page
description: Get details about a specific page (slide) in a presentation.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_object_id.description: The object ID of the page/slide.

name: get_page_thumbnail
description: Generate a thumbnail URL for a specific page (slide) in a presentation.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_object_id.description: The object ID of the page/slide.

name: list_contacts
description: List contacts for the authenticated user.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_size.description: Maximum number of contacts to return. Defaults to 100.

name: get_contact
description: Get detailed information about a specific contact.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: search_contacts
description: Search contacts by name, email, phone number, or other fields.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 30.

name: manage_contact
description: Create, update, or delete a contact. Consolidated tool replacing create_contact, update_contact, and delete_contact.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: list_contact_groups
description: List contact groups (labels) for the user.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_size.description: Maximum number of groups to return. Defaults to 100.

name: get_contact_group
description: Get details of a specific contact group including its members.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

max_members.description: Maximum number of members to return. Defaults to 100.

name: manage_contacts_batch
description: Batch create, update, or delete contacts. Consolidated tool for bulk contact operations.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

contacts.description: List of contact objects to create.

contact_ids.description: List of contact resource names to delete.

name: manage_contact_group
description: Create, update, delete a contact group, or modify its members.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

group_id.description: Contact group resource name (required for update/delete/member operations).

delete_contacts.description: Whether to delete contacts when deleting the group. Defaults to false.

add_contact_ids.description: Contact resource names to add to the group.

remove_contact_ids.description: Contact resource names to remove from the group.

name: list_spaces
description: Lists Google Chat spaces (rooms and direct messages) accessible to the user.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_size.description: Maximum number of spaces to return. Defaults to 100.

space_type.description: Filter by space type: 'all', 'room', or 'dm'. Defaults to 'all'.

name: get_messages
description: Retrieves messages from a Google Chat space.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_size.description: Maximum number of messages to return. Defaults to 50.

order_by.description: Order of results. Defaults to 'createTime desc'.

name: send_message
description: Sends a message to a Google Chat space.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

thread_key.description: Optional thread key to reply to a specific thread.

thread_name.description: Optional thread name for the reply.

name: search_messages
description: Searches for messages in Google Chat spaces by text content.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

query.description: Text to search for in messages.

space_id.description: Optional space ID to restrict search to a specific space.

page_size.description: Maximum number of results to return. Defaults to 25.

name: create_reaction
description: Adds an emoji reaction to a Google Chat message.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

emoji_unicode.description: The Unicode emoji to react with (e.g., '1f44d' for thumbs up).

name: download_chat_attachment
description: Downloads an attachment from a Google Chat message and saves it to local disk.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

attachment_index.description: Index of the attachment to download (0-based). Defaults to 0.

name: create_form
description: Create a new Google Form.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

document_title.description: Optional document title (shown in Drive, separate from form title).

name: get_form
description: Get a Google Form's details and structure.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: set_publish_settings
description: Updates the publish settings of a Google Form.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

publish_as_template.description: Whether to publish the form as a template. Defaults to false.

require_authentication.description: Whether to require authentication to respond. Defaults to false.

name: get_form_response
description: Get one response from a Google Form.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

name: list_form_responses
description: List all responses for a Google Form.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

page_size.description: Maximum number of responses to return. Defaults to 10.

name: batch_update_form
description: Apply batch updates to a Google Form.

user_google_email.description: The user's Google email address. Required.

requests.description: List of Forms API request objects to apply as a batch update.
